== Notes for [[Item:Q87927|Q87927]] ==

Dictator: Marcus Valerius Maximus Corvus in 301 BCE
There is no listing for Marcus Aemilis Barbula as Consul or Dictator, but there is a Marcus Aemilius Paullus known as a Consul in 302 BCE

http://vroma.org/vromans/jruebel/timeline/consuls399-300.html

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F2940CFDB3B1EFBBE49822EF79916C0623
geni:6000000020682190414

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
